Name: ULocalPlayer
Description:
Each player that is active on the current client has a LocalPlayer. It stays active across maps
 	There may be several spawned in the case of splitscreencoop.
 	There may be 0 spawned on servers.

Variables.Name: ViewportClient
Variables.Description: The master viewport containing this player's view.

Variables.Name: AspectRatioAxisConstraint
Variables.Description: How to constrain perspective viewport FOV

Variables.Name: PendingLevelPlayerControllerClass
Variables.Description: The class of PlayerController to spawn for players logging in.

Variables.Name: bSentSplitJoin
Variables.Description: set when we've sent a split join request

Variables.Name: ControllerId
Variables.Description: The controller ID which this player accepts input from.
